findings.description: The MSAF missing-call_id correlation fix only stores one pending orphan tool-call id. In src/assistant/harnesses/sdk/ms_agent_fw.py, each missing-id function_call overwrites pending_orphan_call_id, so if the SDK emits two parallel or nested function_call items without call_id before their function_result items, the first result is paired with the second start id and the remaining result gets a fresh unrelated UUID. That still violates the harness/AG-UI tool lifecycle contract for parallel missing-id tool calls.
findings.resolution: Replace pending_orphan_call_id with a small FIFO queue such as collections.deque[str]. Append each synthesized id for a missing-id function_call, and for a missing-id function_result pop the oldest pending id before falling back to a fresh UUID. Add a regression test with two missing-id function_call items followed by two missing-id function_result items, asserting each ToolCallEnd matches one emitted ToolCallStart and no orphan end id is introduced.
